notes: Service-worker routing fix. HTML page-loads are now network-first: the bare /phantom/ root, index.html, and dct-ios.html are fetched live first and only fall back to the precached shell when offline. Previously the SW was cache-first for the page itself, so the app's built-in boot screen (inside dct-ios.html) was served at the root instead of the new index.html landing, and no deploy could displace it. Offline behavior preserved: root maps to index.html (landing), other documents map to dct-ios.html (app). Static assets (JS, fonts, vendors) stay cache-first. Three stamps aligned at v1.6.66.
